behavior_in_task_description.reason: The instruction provides the exact PRQL queries and describes expected behavior (no NULL, full column projection) that the tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug symptom (NULL instead of columns) without naming the file gen_query.rs or the exact fix.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Behavioral f2p tests check that projection is '*' and not 'NULL', which any correct fix producing wildcard projection would satisfy; repo tests are pre-existing.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests build prqlc, execute it as a subprocess with PRQL input, and inspect the produced SQL.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_distinct_on_wildcard and test_distinct_on_aggregate_wildcard require actual compilation producing '*' in DISTINCT ON output — a stub cannot satisfy this.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both query patterns from instruction.md are covered by separate f2p tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are separated into Gates, Fail-to-pass, and Config-edit sections with comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces SQL text, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: No typos found in paths or commands.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction doesn't name specific files or lines; only describes the domain ('PRQL compiler', 'DISTINCT ON SQL generation').

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: No active config-edit tests; the two config_edit test slots are empty.
